description: You are a satellite operations team lead preparing for an upcoming mission phase that requires intensive thermal monitoring. Create a custom telemetry screen named 'THERMAL_OVERVIEW' for the 'INST' target in OpenC3 COSMOS. The screen must display at least six telemetry items from the 'INST HEALTH_STATUS' packet: TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4, COLLECTS, and at least one additional item of your choice. Ensure the screen has a descriptive title. After creating the screen, write a confirmation report to /home/ga/Desktop/screen_report.json containing the 'screen_name' ('THERMAL_OVERVIEW'), 'target' ('INST'), 'items_displayed' (an array of strings for the 6+ items added), and 'title' (the title given to the screen). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
